programmes.show_description: Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!

programmes.show_name: The Heritage Chart with Mike Read
programmes.show_description: Another episode of the Heritage Chart - new music by heritage acts! With Mike Read.
Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
Sixty minutes of acts that had a single smash hit number 1, then never darkened the top 20 ever again! From Joe Dolce and Kelly Marie in 1980 to Robin Beck at the end of the decade.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made the 80s!

programmes.show_name: Rustie Lee's Eat To The Beat!
programmes.show_description: Food glorious food! The 70s and 80s were full of edible bands and songs, and TV chef Rustie Lee has raided the fridge and pantry to serve up pop's sweet treats. It's going to be a riot!
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made the 80s!
Can you believe none of these 145 songs reached number 1? Mark Goodier with 12 hours of classics - in order - that didn't quite have what it takes, but still sound fantastic!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
New to the NOW 80s archive - another 40 long forgotten pop classics 1980-1989. Including Hall & Oates, Musical Youth, The Blow Monkeys, The Nolans, Stray Cats and Boogie Box High!
A choice selection of the 191 singles that reached the top of the UK charts in the 1980s!
Eleven top 20 hits back to back, starting with 'To Cut a Long Story Short' in 1980 through to their last top 10 hit 'Through the Barricades' in 1986. Including classic number one 'True.'
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
Tony flashes back to the '80s and picks 30 Solid Gold Anthems. Expect Blondie, ABC, Level 42, OMD, A-ha and, of course, some Spandau Ballet classics.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
An hour from the kings of 80s synth - Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark.
Who better to present a definitive countdown of 80s synthpop classics than OMD frontman Andy McCluskey? From Kraftwerk, Ultravox & Gary Numan to New Order, Yazoo and Pet Shop Boys.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
Were you a fan-dau of Spandau? Or a devoted Durannie? It was the ultimate battle of the believers between 1980 and 1984, and it's time to take sides once again!
From 1981's early hits through to 1989's classic 'Violator' album, here's a slice of anthemic Depeche Mode - in order.
Timmy's back with something a little different - a run through of his favourite '80s bands, many interviewed on his 'Timmy on the Tranny' radio show throughout the decade!
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
These are the 30 biggest synth-pop and electronic tracks from the decade that invented the genre! With Gary Numan, Yazoo, Pet Shop Boys, Soft Cell, Visage and Duran Duran.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
Ahh, the one hit wonder. They sneak up on us from nowhere, have one big hit and then never darken the UK top 20 again!
